# Weekly lane verdict — template

**Paste into @Gateway_A (aggregated, no PII)**

```
Sina Gateway — week of [DATE]

Signals: [N] total · [N] high-priority
Lanes: FounderAudit [n] · SourceA [n] · Noetfield [n] · Forge [n] · TrustField [n] · BuildMatch [n]
Outbound: [sent] sent · [replies] replies · [L2] L2
Top campaign: [utm_campaign or —]
Last signal: [timestamp from /api/status]

Infra: [operational / degraded]
Intake: https://sina-gateway-production.up.railway.app/
```

Generate numbers with `npm run ops:weekly` before posting.
